Returns task details including task ID, name, benchmark standard, status, and last execution time. Supports filtering by benchmark type and status through query parameters. Results are paginated.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description lacks context about what benchmark tasks are (compliance assessment tools), what standards they cover, and what data is returned. Enhanced description explains the domain context (compliance benchmarking), clarifies the purpose, specifies return values, and mentions filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding.
